job_title: Associate – AI & Automation (Early Career / New Graduate)
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence Engineer
core_skills: AI tools usage, Automation concepts, Process analysis, Applied AI, Scripting
skill_match_scores: AI tools usage:1.0, Automation concepts:0.0, Process analysis:0.0, Applied AI:1.0, Scripting:1.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree (or final‑year student) in Engineering, Computer Science, Information Systems, Data Science, Business Analytics, or a related field, Strong interest in AI, automation, and applied problem solving, Comfort using AI tools as part of real work (not just academic exposure), Analytical mindset with the ability to break down processes and identify inefficiencies, Clear written and verbal communication skills
preferred_quals: Hands‑on exposure to Claude, AI copilots, generative AI tools, or automation platforms, Basic understanding of automation concepts (workflows, APIs, scripting, RPA, low‑code tools), Familiarity with data analysis, reporting, or systems integration, Basic programming or scripting knowledge (Python, JavaScript, SQL, etc.), Academic, internship, or personal projects involving AI, automation, or process improvement
core_responsibilities: Actively use AI tools such as Claude, Co‑worker, OpenClaw, and other AI platforms as part of day‑to‑day work, Apply AI to support analysis, documentation, workflow design, decision support, and solution development, Develop a strong understanding of where AI adds value vs. where traditional approaches are more appropriate, Analyze workflows and processes to identify automation, simplification, and cost‑reduction opportunities, Support the design and implementation of AI‑enabled or automated solutions that reduce manual effort and improve turnaround time, Help assess and articulate the impact of automation (effort saved, cycle time reduced, complexity eliminated), Contribute to internal AI and automation programs that improve how BETSOL operates, Support external client projects by assisting with AI‑enabled analysis, solution prototyping, and implementation, Work alongside senior engineers, consultants, and leaders on real delivery initiatives—not just experiments, Stay current on emerging trends in generative AI, copilots, agents, and automation platforms
job_summary: BETSOL is a cloud-first digital transformation and data management company offering innovative products and IT services. They are seeking an early-career professional to support AI-driven automation initiatives, utilizing AI tools to analyze workflows and identify opportunities for efficiency and cost reduction.
